pages.text:
REPUBLIC OF GYPRUS

FULL POWERS

I, Nicos A. Rolandis, Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Cyprus, do hereby authorize Mr. Petros

Michaelides, Ambassador Of the Republic of Cyprus in

Paris, to sign on behalf of the Government of the Republic of cyprus, the Financial Protocol between the Government of the Republic of Cyprus and the Government of the

Republic of France.

In witness whereof, I have signed and sealed these

Presents at Nicosia, Cyprus, this 31st Day of October, One

Thousand Nine Hundred and Eighty One.

N.A.Rol (NICOS A. ROLANDIS)

Minister of Foreign Affairs
